motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:

```python
class StockSpanner:
    def __init__(self):
        self.prev_prices = []

    def next(self, price: int) -> int:
        self.prev_prices.append(price)
        if len(self.prev_prices) < 2:
            return -1
        span = 1
        for i in range(1, len(self.prev_prices)):
            if self.prev_prices[i] <= price:
                span += 1
        return span

# Your StockSpanner object will be instantiated and called as follows:
# obj = StockSpanner()
# param_1 = obj.next(price)
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
